card_description: Blaise Pascal is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick develops the "Steuben Cup" myth: humans are "creating angels" who were given the "draught of Lethe" and are now laboring to recreate the divine model (Christ) from memory."
